CustomField.description: DeveloperName of the FeatureDefinition__mdt this routing rule targets, or the literal __DEFAULT__ to act as a catch-all when no feature-specific rule matches. Matches Feature__c.FeatureDefinitionTxt__c at lookup time.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Feature Definition DeveloperName this rule routes (e.g. Invoice_Generation), or __DEFAULT__ for the catch-all rule.
CustomField.label: Feature Definition
